issues.description: Condition missing cost requirement. Text states 'if you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more' but DSL only checks HasCardOnBoard without cost filter. Should be HasCardOnBoard with cost >= 8.
Second effect (SearchDeck) is completely extraneous and not mentioned in card text. Should be removed.
Target scope should specify 'up to 1' but ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader doesn't enforce the 'up to 1' limit. Should be explicit in target definition.
